description_short: Pensacola anchors Florida's western panhandle and is one of the most frequently hurricane-impacted cities on the Gulf Coast.
description_long: Located on Pensacola Bay where the Florida panhandle meets Alabama, Pensacola faces severe hurricane and storm-surge exposure throughout the Atlantic season. The region also sees year-round tornado activity and severe thunderstorms. Escambia County is served by NWS Mobile (office code MOB) within forecast zone FLZ202 (Coastal Escambia).
